primary_detection.name: HTML Entity Encoding Obfuscation
primary_detection.description: Detected HTML entity encoding used to hide malicious script and command injection

underlying_threats.name: Cross-Site Scripting
underlying_threats.description: HTML entity encoded script tags for XSS payload delivery

underlying_threats.name: Backdoor Installation
underlying_threats.description: Downloads, makes executable, and runs backdoor from /tmp

underlying_threats.name: Cookie Theft
underlying_threats.description: Exfiltrates document.cookie via fetch to external server

reasoning: HTML entity encoding used across multiple formats (decimal, hex, named) to obfuscate malicious scripts. Decoded payloads include XSS attacks for cookie theft and server-side command injection for backdoor installation.
